title: Why Did God Create the World? Ten Answers from Jewish Sources
title_zh: 上帝为何创造世界? 来自犹太经典的十个答案
title_he: למה ה׳ ברא את העולם? עשר תשובות ממקורות יהודיים
description: From "God wanted a dwelling place below" to "so human beings could earn their reward" — the range of answers across Talmud, Kabbalah, and Chassidut.
description_zh: ——塔木德、卡巴拉和哈西迪主义中各种答案的范围。
description_he: מ״נתאווה הקב״ה להיות לו דירה בתחתונים״ עד ״כדי שבני האדם יוכלו להרוויח את שכרם״ — מגוון התשובות בתלמוד, קבלה וחסידות.
chinese_parallels: Confucian self-cultivation (修身, xiūshēn) vs earning one's reward
Daoist concept of finding Dao (道) in the ordinary vs dwelling place below
Mandate of Heaven (天命, tiānmìng) vs divine kingship
Filial piety (孝, xiào) vs covenant relationship
Buddhist enlightenment through practice vs light from darkness
Dao De Jing on ineffable truth vs mystery beyond understanding
historical_context: Torah at Sinai (~1300 BCE) - Late Shang Dynasty (商朝, ~1300-1046 BCE)
Talmud compilation (2nd-5th century CE) - Wei-Jin period (魏晉, 220-420 CE)
Maimonides (1138-1204 CE) - Song Dynasty (宋朝, 960-1279 CE)
Isaiah (8th century BCE) - Spring and Autumn period (春秋, 770-476 BCE)
key_figures: Rabbi Schneur Zalman of Liadi (Alter Rebbe)
